title: Meet the preposition with pictures
description: Which preposition works best with the illustration?
topic_path: Parts of speech: the preposition and the conjunction

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the description based on the information in the image.**

[[☃ image 1]]

>President Cat is \_\_\_\_\_\_ the computer.

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Prepositions help describe where or when things are. They often describe the *direction* or *position* of an object, but can also connect ideas.

Examples of prepositions include _on, off, to, of, in, out, after, before, under, over, by,_ and _with_.
Based on the picture, the cat is **"on top of"** the computer.

options.alt: A cat is standing on a computer monitor.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the description based on the information in the image.**

>The giraffe is \_\_\_\_\_\_ the truck.

Examples of prepositions include _on, off, to, of, in, out, after, before, under, over, by,_ and _with_.
>Based on the picture, the giraffe is **"inside"** the truck.

options.alt: A giraffe's neck and head are poking out the top of a semi-truck.
